title: The Social Network (2010) - You're Breaking Up With Me? Scene

sentences.en: Because they're exclusive. And fun. And they lead to a better life.
sentences.ko: 그들은 독점적이고 재미있으며 더 나은 삶으로 이끌어 줍니다.

sentences.en: Teddy Roosevelt didn't get elected president because he was a member of the Phoenix Club.
sentences.ko: 테디 루즈벨트는 피닉스 클럽의 회원이라서 대통령에 선출된 것이 아닙니다.

sentences.en: He was a member of the Porcellian, and yes, he did.
sentences.ko: 그는 포셀리안의 회원이었고, 맞아요, 그는 선출되었습니다.

sentences.en: Well, why don't you just concentrate on being the best you you can be? Did you really just say that?
sentences.ko: 그럼, 최선을 다해 자신이 되는 데 집중해보는 건 어때요? 정말 그렇게 말했어요?

sentences.en: I was kidding. Although just because someone's trite doesn't make it any less true.
sentences.ko: 농담이었어요. 하지만 누군가가 진부하다고 해서 진실이 덜 진실이 되는 건 아니죠.

sentences.en: I want to try to be straightforward with you and tell you that I think you might want to be a little more supportive.
sentences.ko: 당신에게 솔직하게 말하고 싶어요. 좀 더 지지해주면 좋겠어요.

sentences.en: If I get in, I will be taking you to the events and the gatherings, and you'll be meeting a lot of people you wouldn't normally get to meet.
sentences.ko: 내가 들어가면 당신을 행사와 모임에 데려갈 거고, 평소에 만나지 못할 많은 사람들을 만날 거예요.

sentences.en: You would do that for me? We're dating. Okay.
sentences.ko: 당신이 나를 위해 그렇게 해줄 건가요? 우리는 사귀고 있어요. 알겠어요.

sentences.en: Well, I want to try and be straightforward with you and let you know that we're not anymore. What do you mean?
sentences.ko: 하지만 나는 당신에게 솔직하게 말하고 싶어요. 우리는 더 이상 사귀지 않아요. 무슨 뜻이에요?

sentences.en: We're not dating anymore. I'm sorry. Is this a joke? No, it's not. You're breaking up with me?
sentences.ko: 우리는 더 이상 사귀지 않아요. 미안해요. 이게 농담인가요? 아니요, 농담이 아니에요. 나와 헤어지겠다는 건가요?

sentences.en: You are going to introduce me to people I wouldn't normally have the chance to meet. What the f... What is that supposed to mean? Wait. Settle down. What is it supposed to mean?
sentences.ko: 당신은 나에게 평소에 만날 기회가 없던 사람들을 소개해줄 거예요. 뭐라고... 그게 무슨 뜻이에요? 잠깐. 진정하세요. 그게 무슨 뜻이에요?

sentences.en: Erica, the reason we're able to sit here and drink right now is because you used to sleep with the door guy.
sentences.ko: 에리카, 우리가 지금 여기 앉아 마실 수 있는 이유는 당신이 문지기와 잤기 때문이에요.

sentences.en: The door guy. His name is Bobby. I have not slept with the door guy. The door guy is a friend of mine.
sentences.ko: 문지기요. 그의 이름은 바비예요. 나는 문지기와 자지 않았어요. 문지기는 내 친구예요.
